lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਦਰੁ ਸੁਘੜੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ਬੇਤਾ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਅਮੁਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sundar sugharr sujaan betaa gun govind amuliaa |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is beautiful, proficient, wise and all-knowing;

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਦੁਖੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਭਈ ਪੂਰਨ ਆਸ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaag paaeaa dukh gavaaeaa bhee pooran aas jeeo |
lines.english: His Virtues are priceless. By great good fortune, I have found Him; my pain is dispelled, and my hopes are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਮਿਟੀ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak saran teree mittee jam kee traas jeeo |2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I have entered Your Sanctuary, Lord, and my fear of death is eradicated. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਮਲ ਬੰਧਨ ਬਾਧੀਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਮਹਿ ਲੇਖ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: komal bandhan baadheea naanak karameh lekh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, all are bound by the attractive bonds of Maya, and the karmic record of past actions. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਮੁਈ ਕਰਤੀ ਕਰਮ ਅਨੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat bin bhram muee karatee karam anek |
lines.english: Without the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, one dies wandering around in confusion, performing all sorts of rituals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਭਾਣੇ ਸੇ ਮੇਲਿਆ ਵਿਛੋੜੇ ਭੀ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo bhaane se meliaa vichhorre bhee aap |
lines.english: Those who are pleasing to God are united with Him; He separates others from Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰੀਖਮ ਰੁਤਿ ਅਤਿ ਗਾਖੜੀ ਜੇਠ ਅਖਾੜੈ ਘਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: greekham rut at gaakharree jetth akhaarrai ghaam jeeo |
lines.english: In the summer season, in the months of Jayt'h and Asaarh, the heat is terrible, intense and severe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਵਡ ਪਰਤਾਪੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh saranaagatee jaa kaa vadd parataap |2|
lines.english: Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of God; His greatness is glorious! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਆਵੈ ਮਰਤ ਹਾਵੈ ਮਹਾ ਗਾਰਬਿ ਮੁਠੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: neh drisatt aavai marat haavai mahaa gaarab muttheea |
lines.english: She does not see her Lord, and she dies with an aching sigh; she is defrauded and plundered by her great pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਬਿਛੋਹੁ ਦੁਹਾਗਣੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਨ ਕਰੀ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: prem bichhohu duhaaganee drisatt na karee raam jeeo |
lines.english: The discarded bride is separated from His Love, and the Lord does not even look at her.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਬਾਝੁ ਮਛੁਲੀ ਤੜਫੜਾਵੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਰੁਠੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jal baajh machhulee tarrafarraavai sang maaeaa ruttheea |
lines.english: She flails around, like a fish out of water; attached to Maya, she is alienated from the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਪਾਪ ਜੋਨੀ ਭੈ ਭੀਤ ਹੋਈ ਦੇਇ ਸਾਸਨ ਜਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar paap jonee bhai bheet hoee dee saasan jaam jeeo |
lines.english: She sins, and so she is fearful of reincarnation; the Messenger of Death will surely punish her.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਓਟ ਤੇਰੀ ਰਾਖੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak ott teree raakh pooran kaam jeeo |3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, take me under Your sheltering support, Lord, and protect me; You are the Fulfiller of desire. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਧਾ ਲਾਗੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੈ ਇਕੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਰਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saradhaa laagee sang preetamai ik til rehan na jaae |
lines.english: With loving faith, I am attached to my Beloved; I cannot survive without Him, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man tan antar rav rahe naanak sehaj subhaae |1|
lines.english: He is permeating and pervading my mind and body, O Nanak, with intuitive ease. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਲੀਨੀ ਸਾਜਨਹਿ ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: kar geh leenee saajaneh janam janam ke meet |
lines.english: My Friend has taken me by the hand; He has been my best friend, lifetime after lifetime.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨਹ ਦਾਸੀ ਕਰਿ ਲਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹਿਤ ਚੀਤ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: charanah daasee kar lee naanak prabh hit cheet |2|
lines.english: He has made me the slave of His feet; O Nanak, my consciousness is filled with love for God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੁਤਿ ਬਰਸੁ ਸੁਹੇਲੀਆ ਸਾਵਣ ਭਾਦਵੇ ਆਨੰਦ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: rut baras suheleea saavan bhaadave aanand jeeo |
lines.english: The rainy season is beautiful; the months of Saawan and Bhaadon bring bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਣ ਉਨਵਿ ਵੁਠੇ ਜਲ ਥਲ ਪੂਰਿਆ ਮਕਰੰਦ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: ghan unav vutthe jal thal pooriaa makarand jeeo |
lines.english: The clouds are low, and heavy with rain; the waters and the lands are filled with honey.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਕੁਲ ਸਮੂਹਾ ਸਭਿ ਤਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: simar suaamee antarajaamee kul samoohaa sabh tare |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Lord and Master, the Searcher of hearts, all one's ancestry is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਰਬ ਠਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਭਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh poor rahiaa sarab tthaaee har naam nav nidh grih bhare |
lines.english: God is all-pervading everywhere; the nine treasures of the Lord's Name fill the homes of all hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਰੰਗਿ ਜਾਗੇ ਨਹ ਛਿਦ੍ਰ ਲਾਗੇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਸਦ ਬਖਸਿੰਦੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: pria rang jaage neh chhidr laage kripaal sad bakhasind jeeo |
lines.english: No blemish sticks to that being who remains awake and aware in the Love of the Lord; the Merciful Lord is forever forgiving.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਕੰਤੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਦਾ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੰਦੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak har kant paaeaa sadaa man bhaavand jeeo |4|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I have found my Husband Lord, who is forever pleasing to my mind. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸ ਪਿਆਸੀ ਮੈ ਫਿਰਉ ਕਬ ਪੇਖਉ ਗੋਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: aas piaasee mai firau kab pekhau gopaal |
lines.english: Thirsty with desire, I wander around; when will I behold the Lord of the World?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਕੋਈ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਸੰਤ ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਲਣਹਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hai koee saajan sant jan naanak prabh melanahaar |1|
lines.english: Is there any humble Saint, any friend, O Nanak, who can lead me to meet with God? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਮਿਲਬੇ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਊਪਜੈ ਤਿਲੁ ਪਲੁ ਰਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin milabe saant na aoopajai til pal rehan na jaae |
lines.english: Without meeting Him, I have no peace or tranquility; I cannot survive for a moment, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੁਤਿ ਸਰਦ ਅਡੰਬਰੋ ਅਸੂ ਕਤਕੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਿਆਸ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: rut sarad addanbaro asoo katake har piaas jeeo |
lines.english: In the cool, autumn season, in the months of Assu and Katik, I am thirsty for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਾਧਹ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਸ ਪੁਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har saadhah saranaagatee naanak aas pujaae |2|
lines.english: Entering the Sanctuary of the Lord's Holy Saints, O Nanak, my desires are fulfilled. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜੰਤੀ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਫਿਰਤ ਕਬ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਗੁਣਤਾਸ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: khojantee darasan firat kab mileeai gunataas jeeo |
lines.english: Searching for the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, I wander around wondering, when will I meet my Lord, the treasure of virtue?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਕੰਤ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਨਹ ਸੂਖ ਸਾਰੇ ਹਾਰ ਕੰਙਣ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਬਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin kant piaare neh sookh saare haar kangan dhrig banaa |
lines.english: Without my Beloved Husband Lord, I find no peace, and all my necklaces and bracelets become cursed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਤ ਉਤ ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਅਲੋਕਨ ਮਨਿ ਮਿਲਨ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਿਆਸ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: eet ut deh dis alokan man milan kee prabh piaas jeeo |
lines.english: I look here and there, in the ten directions; my mind is so thirsty to meet God!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਦਰਿ ਸੁਜਾਣਿ ਚਤੁਰਿ ਬੇਤੀ ਸਾਸ ਬਿਨੁ ਜੈਸੇ ਤਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: sundar sujaan chatur betee saas bin jaise tanaa |
lines.english: So beautiful, so wise, so clever and knowing; still, without the breath, it is just a body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਧਾਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮੇਲਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗੁਣਤਾਸ ਜੀਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak dhaar kirapaa melahu prabh gunataas jeeo |5|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, shower Your Mercy upon me; unite me with Yourself, O God, O treasure of virtue. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪੂਰਨ ਮਿਲੇ ਦੁਤੀਆ ਬਿਨਸੀ ਭ੍ਰਾਂਤਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh pooran mile duteea binasee bhraant |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, I have met my Perfect God; the illusion of duality is dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਣਿ ਬੁਝੀ ਸੀਤਲ ਭਏ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਉਪਜੀ ਸਾਂਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: jalan bujhee seetal bhe man tan upajee saant |
lines.english: The fire of desire is cooled and quenched; my mind and body are filled with peace and tranquility.
